objective: Accumulate a valid resolution with family-champion successive halving while spending screening compute only after semantic validation.

stages.rule: Validate each encoding, formulation, symmetry representation, or witness transformation once against a direct checker or an independently reconstructed equivalent instance before search.

Screen one representative champion from each materially distinct family before expanding variants within any family. Give each admitted champion a fixed five-second search cap on each of eight frozen stratified leaves, or eight fixed seeds for a global constructive method. Proof replay and direct witness checking are separate validation work and do not weaken the search cap.

Retain immediately when a method supplies at least one independently validated target not already covered by an earlier retained method. Zero coverage demotes a method for the tested structural class; it does not globally eliminate the family unless its validated representative test was sufficiently matched.

After the frozen predecessor, run sequential at the existing 60-second cap over all and only the 44 currently open leaves. Then profile only the survivors and assign the most promising few retained methods using structural-class evidence, net-new closures per CPU-hour, proof storage, and replay reliability; do not uniformly increase the timeout.
Repeat bounded tranches until a validated 40-block witness settles the problem or all 47 exclusion leaves have replayable certificates and independent global coverage validation.

diversity_rule: Candidate identity is bound to an operational mechanism signature. Prompt wording is not a mechanism and cannot create a new candidate.

hardware_rule.basis: The live shared host has one useful SAT core allocation and 4 GB RAM; proof jobs remain serial so nominal parallelism cannot create contention or invalid matched budgets.
hardware_rule.separation_rule: Local constructive searches may run concurrently with the live-host benchmark because they use separate hardware and cannot change its fixed protocol or resource measurements.

frozen_predecessor.instruction: Complete unchanged and treat its results as inherited tournament evidence.

claim_limit: Tournament ranking is allocation evidence only. A global mathematical claim still requires a directly checked 40-block witness or 47/47 certified exclusion coverage with independent global audit.
